name: Oatmeal Cranberry-Nut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed dark brown sugar
3 cups Quick oats, uncooked (not instant or old fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease baking sheet with Butter Flavor Crisco.
2. In a large bowl, combine the Butter Flavor Crisco and brown sugar. Beat until well blended. Add molasses, egg, milk, and vanilla; beat again until smooth.
3. In another bowl, mix together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and allspice. Gradually add this mixture to the creamed mixture at a low speed, stirring just until combined. Stir in the cranberry sauce and nuts. Fold in the oats with a spoon.
4. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake for 12 minutes or until set. Let cool for 2 minutes on the sheet before transferring to a wire rack.
6. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
